_comment: A Brief Gate report (the M1/M2 output) the cockpit's Ratify screen reads. The surviving Judgments await per-claim ratification; the dropped claim (the self-catch) is shown for context but cannot be ratified. Generated by brief-gate/brief-gate.mjs.

judgments.text: We can realize $284/mo in savings by routing calendar-admin and summarization work to cheaper registry-verified agents (CalendarOps, DigestBot).
Security-hardening spend is under-allocated at 24% against the 40% OKR target.
Opus 4.8 is the approved model for this team per the OKR baseline.

dropped.text: $162/mo is being wasted on calendar work that should not run on Opus 4.8 — the calendar-sync effort is routine admin.
dropped.drop_reason: Refuted by adversarial review: PR-103 (Priya, "calendar-sync feature: Google Calendar API integration + UI") proves the calendar-sync work is real product engineering, not routine admin. Dropped.

self_catch: Refuted by adversarial review: PR-103 proves the calendar-sync work is real product engineering, not admin. Dropped.
